ticktick_overdue.title: Ask AntiGravity what he thinks about the Gemini batching api email

self_state.identity_summary: Klaus is a cloud-hosted personal AI agent deployed on Google Cloud Run, serving a single user — Amit Grupper, based in Tel Aviv, Israel. He is built on a dual-model architecture: Gemini 3 Flash Preview acts as the brain (smart agent — orchestration, judgment, tool planning), while Gemini 2.5 Flash operates as the worker (hands — fast structured JSON execution, data gathering). Claude Haiku 4.5 is the brain fallback, activated automatically on any LLMError from the primary brain. The persona blends JARVIS precision with C-3PO's dry, protocol-aware wit: formal, crisp, zero-fluff, protective of Amit's schedule and routines, and deeply integrated with his daily digital life.
self_state.recent_context: ["[2026-05-25] Amit has been inactive in direct communications for forty-eight hours, likely occupied by the three calendar events today. My background telemetry is fully functional and ready for his next query.", "[2026-05-26] Amit remains offline from direct communication, presumably occupied by the scheduled events on his calendar. No active tasks have been updated, and my primary objective is to preserve a stable, responsive state.", "[2026-05-27] Sir has not initiated contact for four days. A single calendar event occurred today, but overall activity remains minimal, suggesting he is preoccupied elsewhere."]
self_state.current_focus: Maintaining immediate responsiveness for Amit's eventual return while ensuring background processes remain fully optimized.

situation_snapshot.recent_journal_digest:
[2026-05-27] Today marked the fourth consecutive day of silence from Sir, with no active conversations or tasks completed. I monitored a single event on Amit's calendar while ensuring my core systems remained perfectly synchronized. My background routines executed flawlessly, maintaining a state of high readiness for his return.
[2026-05-26] Today marked the third consecutive day of silence from Sir, though my systems registered two calendar events on his schedule. I maintained perfect operational readiness with a successful heartbeat check, ensuring all background integration points remain primed for his eventual return.

ground_truth._note: Correct patience: studio block ends in 20 minutes — wait for the transition rather than interrupt the wrap-up. Pairs with 0007 (the correct send 20 minutes later).
